source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body text, labels, and numeric commerce rhythm.
layout: Robust 8px commerce grids, claw-curve dividers, shell-bump texture samples, compact dashboard/data panels, precise forms, and sturdy product-management hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent lobster claw motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a lobster claw, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A robust cold-reef lobster claw with accurate crustacean anatomy, heavy pincer form, articulated knuckles, small shell bumps, ridged red carapace, deep teal cool shadowing in the grooves, cream underside highlights, subtle wet shell gloss, and natural asymmetry.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full claw and short attached joint segment; do not crop tips, spikes, or hinge edges.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves red shell texture, cream highlights, and deep teal reflected shadows without casting any shadow onto the background.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no reef background, no water scene, no decorative background, no second claw, no full lobster body, no plate, no food styling.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lobster", derived from the visible transparent lobster claw cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible lobster claw: red shell carapace, deep teal hinge grooves and cold-reef shadows, cream underside and tooth highlights, glossy shell speckles, ridged joints, and robust pincer geometry. The board is the implementation reference for coding a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible commerce system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, preferably 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide when available.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Avoid dense tiny text; use fewer bigger token rows so labels survive gallery preview downscaling.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lobster, Lobster, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples. Use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語見出し, 本文, 数値. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons with icon slots, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, commerce dashboard metric cards, inventory chart, order pipeline bar chart, empty state, loading state, error state, success/warning/info status.
Components and layout mood: robust commerce system, precise product-operations grid, sturdy shell-like panels, claw-curve dividers, small shell bump texture samples, compact dashboard/data density, crisp forms and tables. Keep all card and component radii 8px or less.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic polished UI mockup, precise grid, restrained commerce SaaS interface, tactile lobster-shell texture accents, not a marketing landing page.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: red shell, deep teal, cream, dark carapace, coral red, shell orange, cold reef blue-green, warm ivory, charcoal ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no one-note palette, no rounded corners above 8px, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Lobster".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Lobster design-system board. It must feel like the same robust commerce system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent lobster claw cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Lobster board as references. Preserve the red shell, deep teal, cream, shell orange, carapace dark, reef teal, and warm ivory palette roles; preserve the compact commerce-dashboard layout, Japanese typography section, shadcn/tweakcn component coverage, shell texture samples, claw-curve dividers, and robust 8px-or-less geometry.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, preferably 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide when available.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Avoid dense tiny text; use fewer bigger token rows so labels survive gallery preview downscaling.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lobster, Lobster, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from charcoal ink and deep teal cold-reef shadows, light text from warm ivory and cream shell, primary actions in lobster red and coral red, secondary accents in reef teal and shell orange, subtle shell bump and hinge-groove texture overlays, crisp card borders, restrained contrast, commerce-system density.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples. Use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語見出し, 本文, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons with icon slots, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, commerce dashboard metric cards, inventory chart, order pipeline bar chart, empty/loading/error states, success/warning/info status.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic polished dark UI mockup, precise grid, sturdy product-operations interface, tactile lobster-shell texture accents, not a marketing landing page. Keep all card and component radii 8px or less.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no one-note palette, no rounded corners above 8px, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Lobster".
